Title: Signal Processing in Nonlinear Plasma Systems
Abstract: This paper investigates signal processing techniques applied to nonlinear plasma wave systems. We derive analytical solutions for wave instabilities and validate results with numerical simulation. Results show strong agreement with experimental data.

Title: Protein Structure Prediction Using Deep Learning
Abstract: We present AlphaFold2, a deep learning system for predicting protein structures from amino acid sequences. The model achieves unprecedented accuracy on the CASP14 benchmark.

Title: Numerical Methods for Plasma Wave Equations
Abstract: A novel finite-element scheme is proposed for solving nonlinear plasma wave equations. The method demonstrates second-order convergence and is validated against analytical benchmarks.

Title: Quantum Computing with Superconducting Qubits
Abstract: We demonstrate quantum supremacy using a programmable superconducting processor performing a task in 200 seconds that would take 10,000 years on a classical supercomputer.

Title: Instability Thresholds in Magnetised Plasma Waves
Abstract: Analytical and numerical investigation of instability thresholds for electromagnetic waves in magnetised plasmas. Critical parameters for onset of instability are identified and compared with laboratory measurements.
